description:
Success body of `POST /test/key`.

`closed_popover` reports whether an open popover was actually dismissed by the (Escape) key. `false` is **not** an error — it simply means there was no open popover to close, mirroring how a real Escape press is a no-op when nothing has a modal grab. Tests can assert on this to confirm the dialog was open before they pressed Escape.
title: KeyResult
